summary: Admin Redeem Limits Overview feature VERIFIED. Backend API (GET /api/admin/redeem-limits-overview) returns correct aggregate and users data with all required fields. Frontend displays the section with aggregate stats and user-wise table correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint correctly requires admin authentication (returns 401 without token)
Aggregate totals correctly match sum of individual user values
Users are correctly sorted by balance in descending order
Frontend correctly displays all aggregate stats with proper formatting
Table shows all required columns: User, Balance, Unlock %, Redeemable, Used, Available
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Redeem Limits Overview feature fully implemented and verified. The endpoint GET /api/admin/redeem-limits-overview requires admin auth and returns aggregate stats (total_users, total_balance, total_earned, total_redeemable, total_redeemed, total_available) plus a users array with per-user breakdown. Frontend displays this in the Admin Dashboard with data-testid attributes: redeem-limits-section, redeem-aggregate, redeem-users-table.
